ENG.title: How to login on your app/web application ?
ENG.subTitle: To login on your app/web application, follow these steps :
ENG.value:
• Open KIKO website. Fill in your phone number.
  • Enter the OTP received and click on proceed.

ENG.title: How to list your products ?
ENG.subTitle: To list your products, follow these steps :
ENG.value:
• Click 'Add New Products' on the left panel.
  • Choose 'Add Single Catalog' for a new product. Specify product category and subcategory.
  • Upload Images. Add 1-9 images, as per the guidelines. Click 'Save and Proceed' to move forward.
  • Enter quantity, pricing, and other info. Use AI for an engaging product description. Finalize by clicking 'Submit Catalogue'.
  • You can verify your product status in 'Inventory.'

ENG.title: How to update inventory?
ENG.value:
• Click 'Inventory’' on the left side panel.
  • Choose 'Pencil Icon'  to edit or update your inventory          
    • Now follow the same step as mentioned in how to list your products

ENG.title: How to change pricing ?
ENG.value:
• Click 'Inventory’' on the left side panel.
  • Choose 'Pencil Icon'  to edit or update your inventory          
    • Now follow the same step as mentioned in how to list your products

ENG.title: How to accept orders ?
ENG.subTitle: To accept orders, follow these steps :
ENG.value:
• Click 'ONDC Orders' on the left panel.
  • Click 'View Order' for customer info, product name, and amount.
  • Click 'Accept' and for example choose self delivery. Confirm Self Delivery. Select 'Yes' for self-delivery.
  • Update Delivery Status. Add an image for delivery proof

ENG.title: How to mark an item out of stock ?
ENG.value:
• Click on 'Inventory' in the left panel.
  • Click the toggle button to mark the product status as out of stock.

ENG.title: How to update online ordering operation timings ?
ENG.value:
• Click on 'Profile' in the left panel.
  • Choose 'Store Timings' to edit or update your store operation timings.

ENG.title: How to switch off online ordering temporarily ?
ENG.subTitle: To temporarily switch off online ordering, go to the left side panel, scroll to the bottom, and click on the toggle button.

ENG.title: How to raise a support ticket on merchant support ?
ENG.subTitle: To raise a support ticket on merchant support. Navigate to FAQ & Support.

ENG.title: How to check payouts information ?
ENG.subTitle: To check payouts information, go to the seller panel, and click on 'ONDC Settlement' in the left panel.

HND.title: Apne app ya web application mein login kaise karein ?
HND.subTitle: Apne app ya web application mein login karne ke liye, in steps ko follow karein :
HND.value:
• KIKO website kholen. Apna phone number bharein.
  • OTP daalen jo aapko mila hai, aur proceed par click karein.

HND.title: Apne products ko list kaise karein ?
HND.subTitle: Apne products ko list karne ke liye, ye steps follow karein :
HND.value:
• left panel mein 'Add New Products' pe click karein.
  • Naye product ke liye 'Add Single Catalog' choose karein. Category aur Subcategory specify karein.
  • 1-9 images add karein, diye gaye guidelines ke anusar. 'Save and Proceed' pe click karein, aage badhne ke liye.
  • Quantity, pricing, aur aur information bharein. Product description ke liye AI ka istemal karein. 'Submit Catalogue' pe click karein.
  • Apne product ka status 'Inventory' mein verify kar sakte hai.

HND.title: Inventory ko update kaise karein ?
HND.value:
• left panel mein 'Inventory' pe click karo.
  • Apne inventory ko edit ya update karne ke liye 'Pencil Icon' pe click karo
    • Ab, product add karne wale steps ko follow karo, jaise - link - yaha bataya gaya hai

HND.title: Pricing kaise change karein ?
HND.value:
• Step 1: left panel mein 'Inventory' pe click karo.
  • Step 2: Apne inventory ko edit ya update karne ke liye 'Pencil Icon' pe click karo.
    • Ab, product add karne wale steps ko follow karo, jaise - link - yaha bataya gaya hai

HND.title: Order kaise accept karein ?
HND.subTitle: Orders accept karne ke liye, in steps ko follow karein :
HND.value:
• left panel mein 'ONDC Orders' pe click karein.
  • Customer info, product name, aur amount ke liye 'View Order' pe click karein.
  • 'Accept' pe click karein aur for example, self delivery ko choose karein. Self delivery confirm karein  'Yes' button pe click karein
  • Delivery proof ke liye ek image add karein.

HND.title: Saman ko out of stock kaise karein ?
HND.value:
• left panel mein 'Inventory' pe click karo.
  • Toggle button pe click karo, taki product status out of stock ho.

HND.title: Online order karne ke operation timings ko update kaise karein ?
HND.value:
• Left side panel mein jaake 'Profile' pe click karo.
  • 'Store Timings' choose karo apne store operation timings ko edit ya update karne ke liye.

HND.title: Online ordering ko temporarily band kaise karein ?
HND.subTitle: Online ordering ko temporary band karne ke liye, left side panel mein jao, neeche scroll karo, aur toggle button pe click karo.

HND.title: Merchant support par ek support ticket kaise raise karein ?
HND.subTitle: To raise a support ticket on merchant support. Navigate to FAQ & Support

HND.title: Payouts ki jaankari kaise check karein ?
HND.subTitle: Payouts ki jaankari dekhne ke liye, seller panel mein jaao, aur left panel mein 'ONDC Settlement' pe click karo
